meta_title: For Students: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no portfolio (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no portfolio. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Claude Code Skills Setup to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Overcome the 'no portfolio' trap. This intermediate checklist teaches you to leverage Claude Code and Antigravity to build production-ready AI applications.
content.answer_block: To bridge the gap between theory and employment, you must demonstrate real-world engineering velocity. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you transform your local terminal into a high-octane development environment. This setup allows you to ship complex, production-grade features rapidly, turning your GitHub profile into a compelling narrative of professional technical competence.
content.intro:
The blank screen of a new repository is where most student dreams go to die. You have the theoretical knowledge, but employers don't care about your GPA; they care about the systems you’ve shipped. The 'no portfolio' trap is a silent career killer, leaving talented developers invisible to hiring managers who demand proof of execution over lines of academic code.

Relief is found in the terminal. By mastering Claude Code, you shift from a passive coder to an AI-augmented architect. This guide provides a strategic framework to build, debug, and deploy professional-grade projects that prove you can handle the complexity of modern SaaS development.

steps.title: Environment Orchestration
steps.description: Initialize your workspace with a robust structure that allows Claude Code to map your architecture effectively.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a scaffold for a modern SaaS application using Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind, ensuring a clean modular directory structure for complex feature integration.

steps.title: Contextual Logic Injection
steps.description: Teach the AI the constraints of your specific stack so it writes production-ready code on the first pass.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current project structure and define a set of strict coding guidelines for error handling and API response consistency.

steps.title: Autonomous Feature Build
steps.description: Execute core logic modules while maintaining strict adherence to your established architectural patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a secure authentication middleware that handles JWT validation and edge-case error logging for our API routes.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "Implement JWT middleware in /lib/auth.ts following the project standards"

steps.title: Automated Debugging Loops
steps.description: Use iterative feedback cycles to squash bugs before they reach the main branch.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the recent authentication module for potential security vulnerabilities and refactor for improved performance.

steps.title: Documentation for Employers
steps.description: Generate high-quality technical documentation that proves your ability to communicate complex system designs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a comprehensive README.md that details the system architecture, decision-making process, and scalability of this application.

pro_tips: Always commit after every successful Claude Code run to build a granular, impressive GitHub commit history.
Use the .clauderules file to enforce specific design patterns, preventing the AI from drifting into outdated syntax.
Treat your AI-generated code as a PR review; always read the diffs to ensure you understand the logic before merging.
Leverage the 'Claude Code' history logs to explain your engineering process during technical interviews.
Integrate CI/CD pipelines early so your portfolio projects are live, not just static code in a repo.
content.next_steps: Once your first feature is live, deploy to Vercel or Railway and write a one-page case study on the 'Why' behind your architectural choices to pin to your portfolio.
content.conversion_block: Stop building for your hard drive and start building for your future career. Master the tools that top-tier engineers use to ship at scale. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
